title: design: slice reference for reaction_changes avoids Vec ownership
description: MessageUpdateInput uses &'a [ReactionChange<'a>] for reaction_changes (line 193 in methods/mod.rs) instead of Vec<ReactionChange<'a>>. This is the right call because: (1) callers on the stack can pass &[...] without allocation, (2) matches the pattern used for other fields (id, body, etc. are all borrowed &'a str), (3) Rust idiom: accept slices over owned collections. No performance cost, consistent API.
close_reason: Design decision: good design, no action needed
